title: FlyInTheSky
description: Using the /fly command you can now fly in survival mode, and all without taking any fall damage.
body:
# 🌔 Fly in Survival Mode and no Fall Damage! ~ All of this with FlyInTheSky mod! 🌔

Tired of being grounded in Survival? With this mod, you can now soar through the skies without worrying about fall damage!

**Command**: /fly

**First use**: **Enables flight** in Survival mode and displays a **confirmation message** in chat.

**Second use**: **Disables flight** and shows a **deactivation message** in chat.

_Enjoy creative-mode freedom while keeping your Survival adventure intact._
